<function=python>
<parameter=code>

print("=== History entries ===")
for i, h in enumerate(history):
    print(f"Entry {i}: action={h.action}")
    seg = h.frame.segmentation
    colors = {n['color']: n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] != 'S'}
    print(f"  colors: {colors}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
